description:
You are a private investigator setting up your Tor Browser workstation for OSINT (Open Source Intelligence) research. Configure four keyword search bookmarks within a folder named "OSINT Keyword Searches" to enable rapid querying from the address bar.

Required bookmarks:
- Title: DuckDuckGo Onion Search | URL: https://duckduckgogg42xjoc72x3sjasowoarfbgcmvfimaftt6twagswzczad.onion/?q=%s | Keyword: ddg
- Title: Wikipedia Search | URL: https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?search=%s | Keyword: wiki
- Title: Wayback Machine Lookup | URL: https://web.archive.org/web/*/%s | Keyword: wayback
- Title: Ahmia Onion Search | URL: https://ahmia.fi/search/?q=%s | Keyword: onion

The '%s' placeholder must be included in the URLs. Verify the configuration by performing a search using one of the keywords in the address bar.
